A WATERSPOUT CAME ASHORE AS AN EF0 TORNADO WITH WINDS UP TO 70 MPH. THE TORNADO MOVED OVER A HOUSE ON THE BEACH. IT THEN CROSSED S OCEAN BOULEVARD AND DISSIPATED ALONG SEAHORSE AVE. A NWS STORM SURVEY IS BEING CONDUCTED. MORE INFORMATION WILL BE FORTHCOMING THROUGH THE ISSUANCE OF A PNS UPON THEIR RETURN THIS EVENING.
A WATERSPOUT MAY HAVE MOVED ONSHORE BRIEFILY BEFORE DISSIPATTING NEAR SEAHORSE AVENUE IN SURF CITY. MORE INFORMATION WILL BE AVAILABLE AFTER A SURVEEY HAS BEEN COMPLETED THIS AFTERRNOON.
